de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement

Interface IGuard

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ProgramConstruct
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Guard, ProgramSV

    public interface IGuard
extends NonTerminalProgramElement

    • Method Summary
